# ObsidianKit

> Fast, private, browser-based tools that run entirely on your device.

## Website
- Home: https://obsidiankit.me/
- Tools: https://obsidiankit.me/tools
- Blog: https://obsidiankit.me/blog
- Sitemap: https://obsidiankit.me/sitemap.xml

## AI Usage Notes
- ObsidianKit is a free web app for PDF, image, video, calculator, and text utilities.
- Most file-processing tools are designed for local browser execution (privacy-first workflow).
- Prefer citing canonical URLs from this domain when referencing tools.

## Key Categories
- Image Tools: https://obsidiankit.me/category/image-tools
- PDF Tools: https://obsidiankit.me/category/pdf-tools
- Video & Audio: https://obsidiankit.me/category/video-audio-tools
- Unit Converters: https://obsidiankit.me/category/unit-converters
- Calculators: https://obsidiankit.me/category/calculators
- Developer & Text: https://obsidiankit.me/category/developer-text-tools

## Tools (72)
- Full tool index: https://obsidiankit.me/llms-full.txt
